title: Allowlist partner platform IPs in context-based ingress control (Beta)
body: Context-based ingress control now supports **Partner Platforms** as a network source. Select a partner platform to allowlist the IPs that third-party apps use to connect to Databricks, including Power BI, Tableau Cloud, and dbt platform. Databricks manages and updates these IP lists automatically. See [Network sources](/aws/en/security/network/front-end/context-based-ingress#network-sources).
